name: Wisdom Wealth International School
description: Agent-readable interface for WWIS, an international school in Trichy offering Cambridge CIE, iPlay, iDiscover, iLead, ILP, admissions guidance, careers, and contact information.

skills.name: Get Programs
skills.description: Returns WWIS program information for iPlay, iDiscover, iLead, CIE, and ILP.

skills.name: Get Admissions Guidance
skills.description: Returns admissions process information and secure private admission form link guidance.

skills.name: Get Contact
skills.description: Returns phone, email, working hours, and address.

skills.name: Get Careers
skills.description: Returns WWIS teacher training and hiring program information.

skills.name: Get Chatbot Topics
skills.description: Returns Ask WWIS AI supported topic areas.
